title: scabiosa gramuntia subsp. tomentosa
intro: Scabiosa gramuntia subsp. tomentosa, also known as Woolly Scabious, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Scabiosa gramuntia subsp. tomentosa include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
